# deck-gamepad-v1 provenance

Vendored from `bos/bmc-main` commit
`27c0ca8a5a3214bff10b6fa6b44ed4fb7beed4fb`. The protocol XML, generated-code
entry point, and build script are unchanged. The standalone manifest replaces
BMC workspace dependency declarations with the same explicit crate versions so
the older Retro Deck application packages build without private Git access.
